action.reasoning: Starting from scratch. Need to build a complete pipeline for single-image 3D reconstruction using the pre-cached TripoSR model. The goal is to minimize LPIPS. Strategy: fine-tune TripoSR on the Arb-Objaverse data. First, I need to understand TripoSR's rendering API with custom cameras, then set up train/predict scripts, do a minimal training run (2 epochs), and submit eval to measure iteration time and validate the pipeline.
